case_title: JEREMIAH WASSOM VS. BUTTERFLY PHOTO et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-03-2008 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO APR-07-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TO SERVE BUTTERFLY PHOTO AND MANNA DISTRIBUTION. DEFENDANT SHARP ELECTRONICS PRESENT TODAY IN COURT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-27-2008 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUL-29-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE COURT'S DECISION ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT MANNA DISTRIBUTION IS CONTINUED TO JULY 29, 2008 PENDING FURTHER PROCEEDINGS AGAINST DEFENDANT BUTTERFLY PHOTO. DEFENDANT MANNA DISTRIBUTION NEED NOT APPEAR AT FUTURE HEARINGS, UNLESS OTHERWISE ORDERED. EXHIBITS TO BE RETAINED IN COURT FILE PENDING FURTHER HEARING. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S.VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WASSOM, JEREMIAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANNA DISTRIBUTION ACCOONA CORP. DBA BUTTERFLY PHOTO $1,350.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,440.00, DEFENDANT BUTTERFLY PHOTO DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT SHARP ELECTRONICS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
